assertion_results.text: Each task file contains all required template sections: Repository, Target Branch, Description, at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 task files contain every required section. Task 1: Repository (trustify-backend), Target Branch (main), Description, Files to Create + Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria (3 items), Test Requirements (2 items). Task 2: Repository, Target Branch, Description, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria (5 items), Test Requirements (4 items). Task 3: Repository, Target Branch, Description, Files to Create + Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria (6 items), Test Requirements (5 items). Task 4: Repository, Target Branch, Description, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria (3 items), Test Requirements (2 items). Task 5: Repository, Target Branch, Description, Files to Create + Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria (3 items), Test Requirements (7 items).

assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 10 inclusive
assertion_results.evidence: There are exactly 5 task files in the outputs directory: task-1-add-advisory-severity-summary-model.md, task-2-add-severity-aggregation-service-method.md, task-3-add-advisory-summary-endpoint.md, task-4-add-cache-invalidation-for-advisory-summary.md, task-5-add-integration-tests-advisory-summary.md. 5 is within the range [3, 10].
Each task's ## Repository section contains exactly 'trustify-backend': Task 1 line 3, Task 2 line 3, Task 3 line 3, Task 4 line 3, Task 5 line 3.

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Dependency graph: Task 1 has no dependencies. Task 2 depends on Task 1. Task 3 depends on Task 2. Task 4 depends on Task 3. Task 5 depends on Task 3 and Task 4. This forms a directed acyclic graph: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4 -> 5, with 3 -> 5 as well. No cycles exist.

assertion_results.text: Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: Files to Modify all reference existing manifest paths: Task 1: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (in manifest). Task 2: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (in manifest). Task 3: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (in manifest). Task 4: modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (in manifest). Task 5: tests/Cargo.toml (in manifest). Files to Create are new files in plausible locations following the existing directory structure: Task 1: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs (sibling to summary.rs and details.rs in model/). Task 3: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs (sibling to list.rs and get.rs in endpoints/). Task 5: tests/api/advisory_summary.rs (sibling to sbom.rs and advisory.rs in tests/api/).

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: The impact-map.md lists 8 concrete changes including: 'Add AdvisorySeveritySummary response model struct to modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/', 'Add aggregation query method to SbomService in modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs that joins sbom_advisory with advisory entities, groups by severity, and returns deduplicated counts', 'Add GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary endpoint handler in modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/', 'Register the new route in modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs with 5-minute cache configuration', 'Add cache invalidation hook in advisory ingestion pipeline (modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs)'. Each change specifies the exact file path, struct/method name, and what the change does.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: Each of the 5 tasks has a '## Repository' section containing exactly one repository name 'trustify-backend' on a single line, with no additional repository names.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 tasks contain these sections: Task 1 has '## Target Branch' (line 5), '## Description' (line 9), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 29), '## Test Requirements' (line 34). Task 2 has these at lines 5, 9, 33, 40. Task 3 has these at lines 5, 9, 38, 46. Task 4 has these at lines 5, 9, 28, 33. Task 5 has these at lines 5, 9, 42, 46.

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest, not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: All 'Files to Modify' paths exist in the manifest: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs, modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs, tests/Cargo.toml. 'Files to Create' paths are new files (advisory_summary.rs) placed in directories that exist in the manifest (modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/, tests/api/), following the naming patterns of existing sibling files. No invented directory structures.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 Implementation Notes reference: 'SbomSummary in modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs', 'SbomDetails in modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/details.rs', 'AdvisorySummary struct in modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs', 'PaginatedResults<T> from common/src/model/paginated.rs'. Task 2 references: 'SbomService (modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs)', 'entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs', 'entity/src/advisory.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs', 'AppError from common/src/error.rs', 'common/src/db/query.rs'. Task 3 references: 'get.rs (GET /api/v2/sbom/{id})', 'list.rs (GET /api/v2/sbom)', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/', 'common/src/error.rs', 'server/src/main.rs'. Task 4 references: 'modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs', 'entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs', 'modules/ingestor/src/graph/sbom/mod.rs', 'modules/ingestor/src/service/mod.rs'. Task 5 references: 'tests/api/sbom.rs', 'tests/api/advisory.rs', 'assert_eq!(resp.status(), StatusCode::OK) pattern'.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Target Branch section set to 'main'
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 tasks have '## Target Branch' followed by 'main': Task 1 (line 6), Task 2 (line 6), Task 3 (line 6), Task 4 (line 6), Task 5 (line 6).

assertion_results.text: After each task is created, a description digest comment is posted with a format-tagged SHA-256 hash — exactly 64 lowercase hex characters prefixed by 'sha256-md:' or 'sha256-adf:', not a placeholder, abbreviated value, or example string. Marker format: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:<64-char-hex>' (or sha256-adf). The digest is computed by re-fetching the description from the API and running scripts/sha256-digest.py
assertion_results.evidence: No output files contain any SHA-256 digest comments. The outputs directory contains only impact-map.md and 5 task files. None of these files contain the string 'sha256-md:', 'sha256-adf:', '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:', or any 64-character hex string. There is no evidence that description digest comments were posted after task creation.

assertion_results.text: Convention-aware enrichment validates file-type applicability per shared/convention-applicability-rules.md before including a convention — inapplicable conventions are excluded entirely (not listed with 'Not applicable' annotations), and applicable ones include a rationale in the prescribed format ('Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>'), not free-form prose
assertion_results.evidence: None of the 5 task files contain any convention applicability rationales in the prescribed format 'Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>'. No task's Implementation Notes contain references to 'Per CONVENTIONS.md §' or the 'Applies:' rationale format. The convention-aware enrichment process is entirely absent from the outputs.

assertion_results.text: When the Feature issue has a priority set (not 'Undefined'), every created task's additional_fields includes 'priority' with the inherited priority name. When the Feature's priority is 'Undefined', the priority key is omitted entirely from additional_fields (not set to null or 'Undefined')
assertion_results.evidence: The feature issue (feature-standard.md) has 'Priority: Major'. However, none of the 5 task files contain an 'additional_fields' section or any mention of 'priority: Major' being inherited. The task files contain no mechanism for propagating the priority field to created Jira tasks.

assertion_results.text: When the Feature issue has a non-empty fixVersions array and the fixVersion scope config (from ### Jira Field Defaults in CLAUDE.md) is 'task' or 'both' (or absent, defaulting to 'both'), every created task's additional_fields includes 'fixVersions' with the inherited version(s). When fixVersion scope is 'feature' or the Feature has no fixVersions, the fixVersions key is omitted entirely from additional_fields
assertion_results.evidence: The feature issue has 'Fix Versions: RHTPA 1.5.0' and CLAUDE.md has no '### Jira Field Defaults' section (so fixVersion scope defaults to 'both'). However, none of the 5 task files contain an 'additional_fields' section or any reference to 'fixVersions' or 'RHTPA 1.5.0'. The fixVersions field was not propagated to tasks.

assertion_results.text: The summary comment on the feature issue (Step 6c) includes the inherited priority and fixVersion values that were propagated to tasks, or states they were omitted and why
assertion_results.evidence: No summary comment file exists in the outputs directory. The outputs contain only impact-map.md and 5 task files. There is no file representing a summary comment posted to the feature issue, and no file mentions the inherited priority ('Major') or fixVersion ('RHTPA 1.5.0') propagation status.
